notes:
The whole-app Liquid Deep pass — Browse, Stories, and Settings now match the water/glass design.

- Browse: glass POPULAR/LATEST tabs and MangaDex/Weeb/Novels source pills; cleaner search
- Settings: theme, rain intensity, and voice speed are now glass pills that fit every screen size
- All filter chips restyled to the glass language
- Voice panel: labels no longer clip; sliders and presets cleaned up
- Larger, consistent tap targets across the app
